flowNote.storeDropoff: This order was picked up in store, so the return is also in store: first you send the request and have to wait for us to approve it - only then can you bring the product, not before. That same day we check it in the store: if it doesn't match what was reported, we return it to you on the spot; if everything checks out, we process your refund (or replacement, depending on what you requested).
flowNote.courier: First you send the request and have to wait for us to approve it. Once approved, a courier will pick up the product at your order's address - don't send it on your own before that. When it arrives at our warehouse we check it: if it doesn't match what was reported, we'll send it back to that same address; if everything checks out, we process your refund (or replacement, depending on what you requested).

messages.replacedStorePickup: We confirmed you received the wrong product. We created a new order at no extra cost for the correct product - it's ready, you can pick it up in store whenever you like.
messages.replacedShipping: We confirmed you received the wrong product. We created a new order at no extra cost for the correct product - check its progress below.
messages.inTransit: We logged that your product is on its way back to our warehouse.
messages.inReview: We received your product and are reviewing it before continuing.
messages.approvedStoreDropoff: You can bring the product to our store whenever you like, within the return window.
messages.approvedCourierPickup: A courier will pick up the product at your order's address.
messages.rejectedReturnedStorePickup: We checked the product and it doesn't match what was reported, so we couldn't approve the return. You can now pick it up at the store.
messages.rejectedReturnedShipped: We checked the product and it doesn't match what was reported, so we couldn't approve the return. We're sending it back to your order's address.
messages.rejectedAfterReviewPending: We checked the product we received and it doesn't match what was reported in your request, so we couldn't approve the return. Contact us if you have questions.
messages.rejectedBeforeReview: We couldn't approve your return request. Contact us if you have questions.

tabHints.none: The product uses a single price and stock (the fields above). There are no options to pick from.
tabHints.simple: A list of options of a single type (e.g. only size, or only color) — each with its own price and stock.
tabHints.matrix: Two combined dimensions (e.g. flavor + size): each combination can have its own price, stock, images, and "price before" (discount). The category discount also applies here, per combination.

primarySection.hint: Just the name — each combination's price, stock, and images are set further down, in "Combinations".

combinationsSection.title: Combinations
combinationsSection.priceTitle: Only if this combination needs a different price than the default
combinationsSection.priceBeforeTitle: Struck-through price for this combination - leave empty to show no discount
combinationsSection.imagesInheritedHint: Starting from "{{label}}" — add or remove freely, it only affects this combination.

productVariantsEditor.noVariants: No variants — the product uses the global price and stock.

validation.priceMustBePositive: The price must be greater than 0.
validation.sizeNeedsPrice: "{{label}}" needs a base price greater than 0.
validation.sizeNeedsStock: "{{label}}" needs a base stock greater than 0.
validation.comboNeedsImage: "{{primary}} × {{size}}" needs at least 1 image (or add images to "{{primary}}" so they apply to all its sizes).
validation.variantDateRange: "{{label}}": "Valid until" can't be earlier than "Valid from".
validation.extraTabIncomplete: Every custom tab needs a title and content (or remove it).
